languages.text: {n}Ведка улыбается, глядя в небо. Ее лицо озаряет внутренний свет.{/n} "Вот и мое искупление для одного, Ваша Светлость. Бы... было честью сражаться рядом с вами. Ведка Дунавски пост сдала..." {n}Рука с костяными когтями порывается отдать вам честь, но смерть настигает Ведку быстрее.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Дункавски
Дунавски губернатор и НЕ спасена в бою

Дункавски
Дунавски губернатор и НЕ спасена в бою

languages.text: {n}Vedka gazes into the sky with a smile, her features illuminated by an inner radiance.{/n} "Here is my atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It... it was an honour to fight by your side. Vedka Dunawski stands relieved of her post..." {n}A hand tipped with bone-claws rises to salute you, but death claims Vedka faster.{/n}

Ведка Дунавски пост сдала..." {n}Рука с костяными когтями порывается отдать вам честь, но смерть настигает Ведку быстрее.{/n}

languages.text: {n}薇德卡面带微笑凝望着天空，脸上洋溢着发自内心的光彩。{/n}“这便是我的一人之赎了，大人。能……能与您并肩作战，是我的荣幸。薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡，就此卸任……”{n}她举起那只指尖镶着骨质利爪的手，想向你敬礼，但死亡比薇德卡更快了一步。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka gazes into the sky with a smile, her features illuminated by an inner radiance.{/n} "Here is my atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It... it was an honour to fight by your side. Vedka Dunawski stands relieved of her post..." {n}A hand tipped with bone-claws rises to salute you, but death claims Vedka faster.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vedka, hatları içsel bir ışıltıyla aydınlanmış bir hâlde, gülümseyerek gökyüzüne bakıyor.{/n} "İşte benim sona kalana kefaretim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Sizin yanınızda savaşmak... Bir onurdu. Vedka Dunawski, görevinden affını istiyor..." {n}Kemik pençeli bir el seni selamlamak için kalkıyor ama ölüm, Vedka'yı daha hızlı alıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka gazes into the sky with a smile, her features illuminated by an inner radiance.{/n} "Here is my atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It... it was an honour to fight by your side. Vedka Dunawski stands relieved of her post..." {n}A hand tipped with bone-claws rises to salute you, but death claims Vedka faster.{/n}

Sizin yanınızda savaşmak... Bir onurdu. Vedka Dunawski, görevinden affını istiyor..." {n}Kemik pençeli bir el seni selamlamak için kalkıyor ama ölüm, Vedka'yı daha hızlı alıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vedka lève les yeux vers le ciel en esquissant un sourire satisfait qui illumine son visage.{/n} « L'heure de mon expiation est arrivée, Votre Seigneurie. Ce... ce fut un honneur de combattre à vos côtés. Vedka Dunawski doit maintenant quitter son poste... » {n}Elle tente de lever sa main aux griffes d'os pour vous saluer, mais la mort l'emporte trop vite.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka gazes into the sky with a smile, her features illuminated by an inner radiance.{/n} "Here is my atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It... it was an honour to fight by your side. Vedka Dunawski stands relieved of her post..." {n}A hand tipped with bone-claws rises to salute you, but death claims Vedka faster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka lève les yeux vers le ciel en esquissant un sourire satisfait qui illumine son visage.{/n} « L'heure de mon expiation est arrivée, Votre Seigneurie. Ce... ce fut un honneur de combattre à vos côtés. Vedka Dunawski doit maintenant quitter son poste... » {n}Elle tente de lever sa main aux griffes d'os pour vous saluer, mais la mort l'emporte trop vite.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vedka alza la mirada al cielo con una sonrisa y sus facciones se iluminan con un brillo interior.{/n} «Esta es mi expiación para el último, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Ha sido... Ha sido un honor luchar a su lado. Vedka Dunawski queda relevada de su puesto...». {n}La mano con garras de hueso se levanta para ofrecerte un saludo militar, pero la muerte se lleva a Vedka antes de que pueda completarlo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka gazes into the sky with a smile, her features illuminated by an inner radiance.{/n} "Here is my atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It... it was an honour to fight by your side. Vedka Dunawski stands relieved of her post..." {n}A hand tipped with bone-claws rises to salute you, but death claims Vedka faster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka alza la mirada al cielo con una sonrisa y sus facciones se iluminan con un brillo interior.{/n} «Esta es mi expiación para el último, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Ha sido... Ha sido un honor luchar a su lado. Vedka Dunawski queda relevada de su puesto...». {n}La mano con garras de hueso se levanta para ofrecerte un saludo militar, pero la muerte se lleva a Vedka antes de que pueda completarlo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vedka blickt mit einem Lächeln zum Himmel und scheint von innen heraus zu strahlen.{/n} "Hier ist meine Sühne für den Einzelnen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Es ... war mir eine Ehre, an Eurer Seite zu kämpfen. Vedka Dunawski ist von ihrem Posten entbunden ..." {n}Vedkas knochige Klaue hebt sich zum Salut, aber der Tod ist schneller.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka gazes into the sky with a smile, her features illuminated by an inner radiance.{/n} "Here is my atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It... it was an honour to fight by your side. Vedka Dunawski stands relieved of her post..." {n}A hand tipped with bone-claws rises to salute you, but death claims Vedka faster.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ヴェドカは微笑みながら空を見上げる。彼女の顔は内なる光に照らされている。{/n}「これは私が償うもの、御{mf|主|女}様。... あなたの側で戦うことは、私にとって栄光でした。ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは任務を全うしました...」{n}骨の爪で覆われた手があなたに敬礼をするが、ヴェドカは死を迎える。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka gazes into the sky with a smile, her features illuminated by an inner radiance.{/n} "Here is my atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It... it was an honour to fight by your side. Vedka Dunawski stands relieved of her post..." {n}A hand tipped with bone-claws rises to salute you, but death claims Vedka faster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ヴェドカは微笑みながら空を見上げる。彼女の顔は内なる光に照らされている。{/n}「これは私が償うもの、御{mf|主|女}様。... あなたの側で戦うことは、私にとって栄光でした。ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは任務を全うしました...」{n}骨の爪で覆われた手があなたに敬礼をするが、ヴェドカは死を迎える。{/n}
